title: NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: The National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Tiruchirappalli) has officially announced the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been released on the official NIT Tiruchirappalli website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 35 years and hold an M.E./M.Tech degree in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Information Technology (IT), or Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) can submit their offline applications up to 13-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per norms.

qualification.details: M.E/M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Information Technology (IT), or Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at NIT Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Project Assistant post is 13th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Engineering (M.E) or Master of Technology (M.Tech) degree in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Information Technology (IT), or Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Assistant position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Assistant in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Tiruchirappalli located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli is located in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The job type is contractual, and the duration will be as per the project requirements.
